entries.title: Can't Get Into Flow? Longer Focus Blocks | Superfocus
entries.description: Flow needs 45-90 min blocks and fewer interruptions. Flow + Deep Work presets with ambient sound. Try free.
entries.h1: You know what flow feels like. You haven't felt it in weeks.
entries.painPoints:
Almost there. Slack ping. Gone.
25 min ends at minute 22.
Flow state: a memory.
entries.recommendedSounds: Lofi or rain for sustained focus
entries.heroSubtitle: Every interruption resets the clock. By the time you settle in, something else demands attention.
entries.painSolution:
45 or 90 minutes. Sounds on.
One task. Timer protects it.
Flow becomes reachable.

entries.title: Can't Stop Getting Distracted? Focus Timer + Sounds | Superfocus
entries.description: Structure beats willpower. Timer + lofi/rain blocks noise and the scroll loop. Free to try.
entries.h1: You closed Twitter. You opened it again without noticing.
entries.painPoints:
Close the tab. Reopen unconsciously.
Phone face-down. Still buzzing.
Focus lasts seconds.
entries.heroSubtitle: Willpower lasts about four minutes. Then your thumb finds the app you swore you wouldn't open.
entries.painSolution:
Timer running = work mode.
Sounds mask the world.
25 minutes. Protected.

entries.title: Focus Habits Never Stick? Track Sessions & Streaks | Superfocus
entries.description: Streaks and session history make progress visible. Pomodoro + analytics. Build habits from data. Free.
entries.h1: You were "going to focus every day." That was three Mondays ago.
entries.painPoints:
Fresh start every week.
No record of effort.
Same promise. Same fade.
entries.heroSubtitle: Motivation spikes on Sunday night and dies by Tuesday. Without tracking, you can't see the pattern—or break it.
entries.painSolution:
One pomodoro today. Logged.
Streak starts. Visible progress.
Habits need proof.

entries.title: Working Until You Crash? Timer With Built-In Breaks | Superfocus
entries.description: Pomodoro forces recovery before you need it. 25 on, 5 off. Sustainable focus. Try Superfocus free.
entries.h1: You worked until midnight again. Tomorrow you'll be useless.
entries.painPoints:
Skip breaks. Push through.
Friday: empty and exhausted.
Weekend recovery. Repeat.
entries.recommendedSounds: Rain or lofi for recovery breaks
entries.heroSubtitle: No breaks feels productive until your brain stops cooperating entirely. Burnout doesn't announce itself—it accumulates.
entries.painSolution:
Breaks are scheduled. Not optional.
Sustain pace all week.
Marathon, not sprint to collapse.

entries.title: Busy All Week, Nothing Shipped? Productivity Timer | Superfocus
entries.description: Block time, track focus sessions, see patterns. Know the difference between busy and productive. Free.
entries.h1: Your to-do list grew. Your output didn't.
entries.painPoints:
Inbox zero. Project zero.
Motion without progress.
Productivity theater.
entries.recommendedSounds: Lofi or cafe for work blocks
entries.heroSubtitle: Busy is not productive. You answer messages, attend calls, and end the day with the hard thing still waiting.
entries.painSolution:
Measure focus time, not activity.
Block deep work first.
Ship one thing daily.

entries.title: Losing Focus Too Soon? Extended Blocks | Superfocus
entries.description: Build focus stamina with 45-min Flow or 90-min Deep Work. Gradual extension. Try Superfocus free.
entries.h1: You lose focus at minute twelve. Every time.
entries.preset: Flow (45 min) or Deep Work (90 min)
entries.painPoints:
12 minutes in. Mind wanders.
25 feels impossible.
Never build endurance.
entries.recommendedSounds: Rain or lofi for extended sessions
entries.heroSubtitle: Short attention isn't a character flaw—it's untrained stamina. You've never built the muscle for longer blocks.
entries.painSolution:
Start at 25. Extend to 45.
Track what works.
Longer blocks over time.

entries.title: World Won't Leave You Alone? Block Distractions | Superfocus
entries.description: White noise, lofi, rain—plus a timer that says work now. Block the world for one block. Free.
entries.h1: Noise, notifications, and your own brain team up against you.
entries.painPoints:
Every sense under attack.
Can't escape the noise.
Focus feels impossible.
entries.heroSubtitle: You can't control the open office, the neighbor, or the group chat. You can control your next 25 minutes.
entries.painSolution:
Headphones. Cassette on. Timer start.
25 minutes of protected space.
One block at a time.

entries.title: Phone Is the Problem? Browser Focus Timer | Superfocus
entries.description: Superfocus runs in your browser where work happens. No app to open, no notifications to swipe. Try free.
entries.h1: The timer app on your phone is the distraction.
entries.painPoints:
Phone for timer. Phone for distraction.
Same device. Wrong tool.
Can't separate them.
entries.heroSubtitle: Pick up phone to start timer. See notification. Twenty minutes gone. The tool became the trap.
entries.painSolution:
Timer in browser. Phone away.
Work on desktop.
Focus where you type.
